text:
Detection: No security vendors flagged this file as malicious
File: skill.zip  Size  19.83 KB
Last analysis: 2026-02-13 06:29 UTC
Code insights: Type: OpenClaw Skill
Name: revolut
Version: 1.3.1

The skill bundle is benign. It uses Playwright for legitimate Revolut web automation (login, accounts, transactions, portfolio). Key security controls include strict output path sanitization via `_safe_output_path` in `scripts/revolut.py` to prevent arbitrary file writes outside the workspace or `/tmp`, and `_safe_filename_component` to prevent path traversal in user-derived filenames. Session state and optional PINs are handled locally for their stated purpose, and the `logout` command ensures cleanup. All network communication is directed to legitimate Revolut domains. The `SKILL.md` instructions are clear and do not contain any malicious prompt injection attempts.
